items.description: Displays an alert message with optional title and description.

items.description: A circular avatar that displays an image or fallback initials.

items.title: Badge

items.title: Button
items.description: A native Perry button with variants, sizes, tokens, and interaction states.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: A container card with header, content, and footer sections.

items.title: Checkbox
items.description: A checkbox control for boolean selections with optional label.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: A modal dialog with title, description, content area, and action footer, built on Perry sheet APIs.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: A styled text input field wrapping Perry's TextField.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: A styled text label for form fields and sections.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: A progress bar that displays completion status for a task or process.

items.name: radio
items.title: Radio
items.description: A radio group for single selection from a list of mutually exclusive options.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: A native dropdown select wrapping Perry's Picker widget.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: A horizontal or vertical divider line.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: A sliding panel overlay that slides in from any edge of the viewport, with an optional header, scrollable content area, and action footer.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: A placeholder loading indicator that mimics the shape of content yet to load.

items.title: Switch
items.description: A toggle switch control for enabling or disabling settings, with optional label.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Tab navigation for switching between content panels with active state tracking.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: A multi-line text input wrapping Perry's TextArea with consistent styling.

items.name: toast
items.title: Toast
items.description: A non-intrusive notification toast with variants and auto-dismiss support.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: A hover tooltip for showing contextual information over any widget.

items.name: settings-window
items.title: Settings Window
items.description: A complete settings window with sections, toggles, inputs, and actions.
